heading: Declaration of purpose
label: 8211 Declaration of purpose
text: The purpose of this subchapter is to authorize the Secretary to implement a pilot program under which the Secretary may provide assistance in the establishment of new State medical schools at colleges or universities which are primarily supported by the States in which they are located if such schools are located in proximity to, and operated in conjunction with, Department medical facilities.
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40section 5071 of this titlesubstituted “Secretary” for “Administrator” in two places and substituted “Department” for “Veterans’ Administration”.Pub. L. 102–831976— substituted “the Administrator” for “he”.Pub. L. 94–581
